STEP 1157 — Legendre's conjecture n ∈ [101, 200] Lean 4 extension
  =================================================================

  Follow-up to `CollatzRei/LegendreSmall.lean` (n ∈ [1, 100], 12 theorems).
  Same explicit-witness + `native_decide` pattern.

  Target: n ∈ [101, 200] explicit prime witnesses (100 new witnesses).
  Combined with prior LegendreSmall.lean (n ∈ [1, 100]):
    Rei-AIOS Legendre coverage n ∈ [1, 200] (~117 theorems total).

  Honest positioning:
    - Legendre's conjecture (1808): for every n ≥ 1, there exists a prime p
      with n² < p < (n+1)². OPEN unconditio
